initiatives.name: Blackbird Infoshop
initiatives.description: A radical bookstore and community space fostering mutual aid through accessible literature, political education, and community organizing. They provide a hub for movement resources, skill-sharing, and solidarity building while creating spaces for learning, connection, and collective action.

initiatives.name: Kingston Emergency Food
initiatives.description: KEFC partners with organizations and individuals that are working in solidarity with community members to ensure that folks have food.
